description:
Sets your Windows desktop wallpaper to the current ADO sprint (e.g. 278.1).

WhatSprintIsItWallpaper sets your Windows desktop wallpaper to a clean, dark image showing the current sprint and week (for example "278.1"), using the same offline date formula as whatsprintis.it. After a one-time install it keeps itself up to date automatically via a Windows Scheduled Task that runs at logon and once daily, so the number rolls over on its own every Saturday. No login, network, or Azure DevOps account required.
